reasoning: The question asks if the album 'The Life of a Showgirl' will be #1 for 14 straight weeks on the Billboard 200. Based on my search results, Taylor Swift's 2025 album 'The Life of a Showgirl' was an enormous commercial success. However, while it spent 12 weeks at #1 in total (which is itself phenomenal), these were nonconsecutive weeks. After spending its first 7 consecutive weeks at #1, it dropped to #3 in the week of December 6, 2025, and then returned to #1 on December 13 for its eighth nonconsecutive week. Thus, it mathematically failed to achieve 14 consecutive weeks at #1. Given this concrete chart history, the probability of it achieving this is functionally 0, so I will submit the minimum allowed probability of 2%.
